Uses of Class
jline.api.PFQN.pfqnNcReturn

  • Packages that use PFQN.pfqnNcReturn 
    Package Description
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models

    • Uses of PFQN.pfqnNcReturn in jline.api

      Methods in jline.api that return PFQN.pfqnNcReturn 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.compute_norm_const_ld​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
      Run a normalizing constant solution method in a load-dependent model
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_ca​(Matrix L, Matrix N)
      Compute the normalizing constant using the convolution algorithm
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_ca​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z)
      Compute the normalizing constant using the convolution algorithm
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_gld​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
      Compute the normalizing constant of a single-class load-dependent model
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_gldsingle​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
      Auxiliary function used by pfqn_gld to computer the normalizing constant in a single-class load-dependent model.
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_kt​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z)  
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_le​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z)
      Logistic expansion method to compute the normalizing constant
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_ls​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, long I)
      Logistic sampling method to compute the normalizing constant
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_ls​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, long I, long seed)
      Logistic sampling method to compute the normalizing constant
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_mmint2_gausslegendre​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Integer m)
      Compute the normalizing constant of a repairmen model using Gauss-Legendre integration
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_ncld​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
      Main method to compute the normalizing constant of a load-dependent model
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_panacea​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z)  
      static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn PFQN.pfqn_panacea​(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, SolverOptions options)
      Compute the PANACEA approximation
